texto: Truth must necessarily be stranger than fiction
autor: for fiction is the creation of the human mind and therefore congenial to it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de for fiction is the creation of the human mind and therefore congenial to it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Truth must necessarily be stranger than fiction” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, g-k-chesterton, truth, útil em momentos de reflexao.
